zh.Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Upper Normandy,: 法國豪-諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil於1000年1月10日出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓時，她的父親Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube29歲，母親Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine33歲。她於1025年之前與Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1053年5月24日在法國o-阿爾培斯o瓦盧斯享年53歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布可雷斯勒-福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

variants.name: Adel
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. en.lifeSummary: When Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil was born on 10 January 1000, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube, was 29 and her mother, Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine, was 33. She married Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi before 1025, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 24 May 1053, in Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Crespy-le-Neuf, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil est née le 10 janvier 1000, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi avant 1025, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1053, à Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Crespy-le-Neuf, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil am 10. Januar 1000 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube 29 und ihre Mutter Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine 33. Sie hat vor 1025 in Europa Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. Mai 1053 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Crespy-le-Neuf, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil è nata il il 10 gennaio 1000 nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi prima del 1025, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 maggio 1053, nel Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Crespy-le-Neuf, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuilが1000年1月10日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンで生まれた時，父Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aubeは29歳，母Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seineは33歳であった。1025年以前にヨーロッパでRoger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Viと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1053年5月24日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンヴァロイスで53歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベクレスプイ-レ-ネウフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil(이)가 1000년 1월 10일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1025년 이전 우럽에서 Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1053년 5월 24일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 발이스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 크레스p이-레-니우프에 묻혔다.

mn.10 January 1000–24 May 1053: 1000 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 10–1053 оны Тавдугаар сарын 24

pt.10 January 1000–24 May 1053: 10 de janeiro de 1000–24 de maio de 1053
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1000, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi antes 1025, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1053, em Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Crespy-le-Neuf, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil родилась 10 января 1000 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi перед 1025 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 24 мая 1053 г. в местности валоис, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности креспи-ле-неуф, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.10 January 1000–24 May 1053: 10 de enero de 1000–24 de mayo de 1053
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil nació el 10 de enero de 1000, en Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Nocher de la Ferté-sir-Aube I, count of Bar-sur Aube, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Countess Adelaide Adelisa de Soissons de-Bar-Sur-Seine, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Roger de Vignory Count de Bar-sur Seine, Sgr. de Vi antes de 1025, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1053, en Valois, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Crespy-le-Neuf, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
